headline: Expanding AI Footprint Lifts Moat Stocks
summary: The S&P 500 gained 5.26% in May, but leadership was narrow, with mega-cap tech driving most of the gain. Read more here.

headline: Datadog: A True Anomaly In The Software Sector
summary: Datadog has defied the 'SaaSpocalypse' narrative, surging over 70% YTD as AI-native demand accelerates growth. Read more on the DDOG stock outlook now.
